feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2128 201 1927 99
US 1976 176 1800 81

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Island Story: 100 Days
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $2.99 [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

Application Description

You wake up on the beach of a mysterious tropical island after a shipwreck. Survival is your only goal: build shelter, craft tools, find food and fresh water, and uncover the island's hidden secrets! ■ Simple Controls • Tap to move and gather resources. ■ Survival • Eating wild fruits alone won't satisfy your hunger. • Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. ■ Realistic Health System • Staying healthy is a constant struggle. • Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… ■ Upgrade Your Camp • Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. ■ Dynamic Weather • Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. ■ Self-Sufficiency • Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. ■ Relaxation • Immerse yourself in natural white noise. --------- No in-app purchases · No ads

entry.title: Shotgun King
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$6.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $6.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

Chess, but all your army has gone over to the white side, leaving you with nothing but your royal shotgun and your wounded pride. Carried by your dark folly, you decide it's time to teach those white pieces to fear the Shotgun King. Every turn, you may either move your king or shoot at enemy pieces, after what you'll need to move again to reload your shotgun. Avoid checkmate and kill the enemy king to complete the floor. After each floor, you may choose between two random combinations of one upgrade for you and one upgrade for the other side. Choose wisely and keep on winning floors and you just may get your kingdom back. Runs may take ~20 minutes to complete. The game features 15 ranks of difficulty, unlockable cards, over 100 achievements to complete, an endless mode, and now a chase mode where you get continually assailed from all sides!

entry.title: Dungeon Within
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $4.99 [$4.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • Underworld Expansion Pass：$5.99
  • Moonveil Skin Set：$9.99
  • Pioneer of the Abyss：$9.99
  • Essence of Transcendence：$29.99
  • Ark of Eternity：$29.99
  • Time Traveler：$5.99
  • Beginning of Growth：$9.99
  • Beginning of the Abyss：$9.99
  • Essence of the Abyss：$19.99
  • Essence of Beginning：$19.99

Application Description

"Reclaim Your Throne as the True Dark Lord!" Awaken as an amnesiac Dark Lord in an endless dream world and construct your own ruthless dungeon. Explore the realm to rally scattered monsters, deploy deadly traps, and bring ruin to insolent invaders. Death is not the end, but the beginning of new power. Through endless roguelike runs, forge your DUNGEON into the ultimate, inescapable fortress! [Design & Defend Your Dungeon] Your strategy becomes the absolute law of the dungeon. Deploy diverse combat rooms, sinister structures, and lethal traps to create the ultimate kill zone for incoming heroes. [Raise a Formidable Monster Army] Explore the world to awaken diverse monsters from their deep slumber. Draft creatures with unique abilities and racial synergies into your ranks, and command the frontline with the ultimate monstrous horde. [Unleash the Dark Lord's Authority] Are the invaders breaching your dungeon's core? Unleash the true power dormant within the Dark Lord. Turn the tide of battle instantly with devastating abilities that will bring arrogant foes to their knees. [Unpredictable Roguelike Encounters] Every run paves a new path. Collect mysterious relics hidden throughout the dungeon, navigate through bizarre unknown events, and empower your forces. Your choices will dictate the fate of the next battle. [Fragments of Memory & True Awakening] Do not stop even if you fall in battle. Gather fragments of lost memories and legacies from past runs to awaken the Dark Lord's true power. Transcend death and reclaim your eternal, absolute authority. Take your rightful place on the throne now and dominate your own grand, brutal dungeon!

entry.title: Hyper Light Drifter
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Finally, Heart Machine's award winning slash-'em-up arrives to iOS in the most polished and refined version yet, the Special Edition. ► Winner of the Audience Award and Excellence in Visual Art awards of the prestigious Independent Games Festival. ► 14 + nominations among the Best Visual Design, Best Audio and Best original Game categories. ► 9/10 Destructoid - A hallmark of excellence. There may be flaws, but they are negligible and won't cause massive damage. ► 9.5/10 Game Informer - The combination of soundtrack, art, and combat creates a rabbit hole worth your full exploration. ► Eurogamer Recommended - Heart Machine's slash-'em-up is punishing and precise - and incredibly beautiful. ► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences. ► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action. ► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own. Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease. Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies. Features: ● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad. ● Compatible with MFi controllers. ● Game Center achievements. ● Haptic Vibration. ● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated. ● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare. ● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound. ● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace. ● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Road to Empress
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress II：$13.90 → $12.90 [$12.90 ~ $13.90]

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress Collection：$17.49
  • Road to Empress I：$6.79
  • Road to Empress II：$12.90
  • 600 Flowers：$0.99
  • 6000 Gold Flower：$0.99
  • 3,000 Flowers：$4.99
  • 600 Eggs：$0.99

Application Description

This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters. A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices! Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power. ● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally. Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory! ● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast! ● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story! Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne. ● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate! You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings. ● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips: Review Memorials: With a press, witness your realm's lives—answer petitions, resolve disputes, and bring prosperity to your people. Issue Edicts: Your imperial brush decides ministers' fate—reward merit, punish fault, and govern with wisdom. ● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile! About New One Studio An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, everyone who journeyed with The Invisible Guardian shared its BAFTA glory, reaffirming that great interactive storytelling can truly stay in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage. Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan. Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress. In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage. In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you! (Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.) YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

entry.title: Wall of insanity
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.39 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series. It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world. You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless. Story: A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins... Key Features: - Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world. - A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go? - A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition. And your life. - Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed. Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds. - Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Lies of P
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$59.99 → $29.99 [$29.99 ~ $59.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$29.99

In-App Purchases

  • Lies of P: Overture：$29.99

Application Description

You are a puppet created by Geppetto who’s caught in a web of lies with unimaginable monsters and untrustworthy figures standing between you and the events that have befallen the world of Lies of P. You are awakened by a mysterious voice that guides you through the plagued city of Krat - a once lively place that has been poisoned by madness and bloodlust. In our soulslike, you must adapt yourself and your weapons to face untold horrors, untangle the unfathomable secrets of the city's elites and choose whether to confront predicaments with the truth or weave lies to overcome them on the journey to find yourself. - A DARKLY ELEGANT AND CRUEL WORLD Unearth the secrets of the city of Krat – a place soaked in the style of the Belle Epoque era which once thrived due to its puppet industry and now sees its streets covered in blood. - BATTLE WITH TWISTED INSTRUMENTS Develop a unique combat style to counter vicious enemies and terrain by weaving together dynamic weapon combinations, utilizing the Legion Arms, and activating new abilities. - WHAT’S IN A LIE? There will be times when you will be confronted with choices where you can give comfort to others in sorrow or despair by lying…or you can choose to tell the truth. Carve your own path. - A CLASSIC REIMAGINED Experience the beloved fairy tale of Pinocchio reinterpreted as a dark, grim narrative that allows players to discover the secrets and symbols hidden within the world of Lies of P.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$39.99 → $19.99 [$17.99 ~ $39.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$19.99

Application Description

From legendary game creator Hideo Kojima comes a genre-defying experience, now expanded in this definitive DIRECTOR’S CUT. In the future, a mysterious event known as the Death Stranding has opened a doorway between the living and the dead, leading to grotesque creatures from the afterlife roaming the fallen world marred by a desolate society. As Sam Bridges, your mission is to deliver hope to humanity by connecting the last survivors of a decimated America. Can you reunite the shattered world, one step at a time? DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT on iOS includes a HIGH FRAME RATE, PHOTO MODE, and cross-over content from Valve Corporation's HALF-LIFE series and CD Projekt Red's Cyberpunk 2077. Stay connected with players around the globe with the Social Strand System™. Mac and iOS • Sign-in to iCloud and activation of iCloudDrive are required to play this product. • This product can be played offline, but a network connection is required to fully experience the Social Strand System™. Communication fees will be incurred during online play. Only for iOS version • When playing this product for the first time, you will be required to download additional data. You can start the game once you have downloaded approximately 13 GB, but additional downloads will occur as the game progresses, requiring a total of approximately 50 GB of downloads. Additional downloads will occur when additional language voice data is used. FAQs https://505.games/DSDCAppStoreFAQ

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 不玩手机-自律习惯养成记
entry.id: 不玩手机-自律习惯养成记-us-1783636051492
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 不玩手机永久会员：$3.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $19.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 不玩手机永久会员：$0.99
  • 不玩手机年自动订阅：$8.99
  • 周订阅：$0.49

Application Description

这个App可以让你更专注地工作或学习，戒掉手机瘾，让你在工作或学习的时候远离手机，提高工作和学习的效率。 当开启了不玩手机警报后，你在设定的时间里拿起手机将会报警，这将培养你更专注于学习或工作的习惯。 App使用方法： 1. 选择要集中精力工作的时间间隔。 2. 把手机放在水平桌面上。 3. 点击开始按钮。 4. 直接按下锁定屏幕按钮。 5. 开始并专注于你的工作或学习。 快来和我们一起进步吧！！！ 1. 该服务是订阅制的收费服务，这意味着您将为未来的订阅使用而提前预支费用。当前您可以选择以按季度的方式来使用该服务。在每个订阅周期即将结束时，您的订阅默认将自动续费，除非您自行取消自动续费，或者由我们取消该服务。 2. 取消订阅:如需取消续订，请至少提前24小时操作取消。您可以通过如下方法取消：打开系统设置 - 点击Apple ID - 点击订阅 - 选择高级版，取消订阅即可。 3. 恢复购买:如果在支付过程中，收到提示 “您目前已经订阅该项目”，并且确定之前完成了购买，可以点击右上角 “恢复购买” 进行购买恢复。 会员服务协议及自动续费协议： https://gcn1s2rmayw3.feishu.cn/wiki/YgqKwPdJmiH0ulkF92kco1CznCg?from=from_copylink 隐私政策： https://gcn1s2rmayw3.feishu.cn/wiki/SGBIwmUWCiPWoWktE5sclLRgnol?from=from_copylink

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 彩云天气Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • SVIP auto-renew annually：$13.99 → $1.49 [$1.49 ~ $13.99]

All Price Information

Price：$14.99

In-App Purchases

  • SVIP auto-renew annually：$1.49
  • SVIP auto-renew yearly：$12.99
  • SVIP auto-renew quarterly：$3.99
  • 100 Days SVIP：$2.99
  • Quarterly SVIP：$2.99
  • 3-Year SVIP：$24.99
  • 545 Days SVIP：$12.99
  • 1-Year SVIP：$12.99

Application Description

Differences from the free version: - exclusive rain notification - no Ads Expect the Unexpected with this Beautiful and Easy-to-use Weather App Accurate Minute to Minute Rainfall Forecast - When will the rain start and when is it going to stop? Know about the weather in advance and plan your day out properly! Street-level accuracy: No more imprecise forecasts based on a national or city level! Your exclusive weather forecast for every block in the neighborhood is here! Multiple Location Selections: Street-level accurate forecasts to keep an eye on your loved ones! China Rainfall Map - We use the National Meteorological Radar to produce our accurate forecast. Just take a glimpse to know exactly where and how heavy the rain will be! China Air Pollution Map - Is the pollution growing stronger or fading away? Where is it heading to? Just take a look at this map and get the answer to all of your questions! Real-time satellite imagery From the astronaut's point of view, tracing the flowing cloud and glittering days, and Help yourself judge the weather Omni-directional weather map Look at the evolution trend of precipitation, temperature, dew point temperature, humidity and visibility in the next two days. Weather Feedback - If you feel that our forecast is not completely accurate, please tap the feedback button to help us improve! ------ A big thank you to the "Swarma Club" and our partners for their long-term and unfailing support! Automatic renewal service: 1. Service name：svip auto-renew monthly, svip auto-renew annually. 2. Price：9 RMB / Month, 90 RMB / Year. 3. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal. 4. You can manually open the Apple mobile phone 'Settings' - > enter 'iTunes Store and App Store - > click 'Apple ID', select 'view Apple ID', enter the 'account settings' page, click 'subscription', select 'ColorfulClouds Pro continuous subscription', and cancel subscriptions to end it. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. 5. Term of use: https://caiyunapp.com/h5/agreement/vipprotocal.html?ostype=ios_pro&lang=en_US 6. Privacy policy: https://caiyunapp.com/h5/agreement/privacy.html?ostype=ios_pro&lang=en_US

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Digline: Cozy Mining
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → $1.99 [$0.99 ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground. Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out. Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing. Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs: • Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency • Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement • Optimize routes to maximize each descent Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all. Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below. Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun! What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history. Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun. Features: • intuitive one-finger portrait controls • short runs that fit easily into a minute or two • persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition • multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises • resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation • a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress • a market system for trading what you bring back • progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run • a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it • no ads, and no pay-to-win systems • by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase • achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

entry.title: Kaiju Attack 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

To wash away the shame of defeat two years ago, Chaos has gathered an alien coalition, attacking Earth once more, citing humanity's sins as justification. Even the once-defending superhero now turns against us. As the commander, how will you resolve this crisis? What lies ahead for humanity and Earth? Game Intro Kaiju Attack 2, the sequel to our critically acclaimed title released two years ago, builds upon the strengths of the first installment while addressing its shortcomings. We've introduced numerous new features and enhancements, including: - Faster-paced and more intense gameplay. - Introduction of currency tiles alongside the existing three types. - Ability to deploy multiple types of secret weapons simultaneously. - Nine new alien bosses with smarter, more cunning behavior AI for increased challenge. - Eight new secret weapons, including super robots capable of splitting into three separate units and combining.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
